variants.title: HiFi Filter FS 8 Breather Filter | Replaces the MP Filtri SA115G1L40A
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter FS 8 Breather Filter is HiFi's replacement to the MP FILTRI SA115G1L40A. Easy to install and replace, the FS 8 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
